questions.hindi: उसने कहा कि वह थका हुआ था।
options: If you work hard, you will succeed.
He told me to do this work.
He said that he was tired.
questions.answer: He said that he was tired.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "उसने कहा कि वह थका हुआ था।" = "He said that he was tired."
Full sentence: "She asked where I lived."
Correct sentence: "You are coming, aren't you?"

options: I have been living here for two years.
This is the most interesting book.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "राम सबसे लंबा है।" = "Ram is the tallest."
Full sentence: "This is the most interesting book."
Correct sentence: "I need a book."

options: If only I had studied earlier.
He said that he was tired.
If you work hard, you will succeed.
The sun rises in the east.
questions.answer: The sun rises in the east.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "सूरज पूरब से निकलता है।" = "The sun rises in the east."

questions.sentence: If you work _____ you will succeed.
questions.explanation: Full sentence: "If you work hard, you will succeed."

questions.sentence: If I had money, I will buy this house.
options: If I had money, I will buy this house.
If I had money, I would buy this house.
questions.answer: If I had money, I would buy this house.
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "If I had money, I would buy this house."

questions.hindi: अगर मैंने मेहनत की होती, तो मैं पास हो जाता।
options: This movie is better than that movie.
I have been living here for two years.
If I had worked hard, I would have passed.
questions.answer: If I had worked hard, I would have passed.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "अगर मैंने मेहनत की होती, तो मैं पास हो जाता।" = "If I had worked hard, I would have passed."

questions.sentence: I have been living _____ for two years.
questions.explanation: Full sentence: "I have been living here for two years."

questions.sentence: I has been living here since 2020.
options: I has been living here since 2020.
I have been living here since 2020.
questions.answer: I have been living here since 2020.
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "I have been living here since 2020."

questions.hindi: मुझे काश मेरे पास ज़्यादा पैसे होते।
options: I wish I knew this language.
The sun rises in the east.
If only I had studied earlier.
I wish I had more money.
questions.answer: I wish I had more money.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "मुझे काश मेरे पास ज़्यादा पैसे होते।" = "I wish I had more money."
Full sentence: "If only I had studied earlier."

questions.sentence: He told me to do this work yesterday.
options: He told me to do this work yesterday.
He told me to do this work.
questions.answer: He told me to do this work.
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "He told me to do this work."

questions.hindi: वह अच्छा गाता है, है ना?
options: If I had worked hard, I would have passed.
This movie is better than that movie.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "वह अच्छा गाता है, है ना?" = "He sings well, doesn't he?"

questions.sentence: This movie is _____ than that movie.
questions.explanation: Full sentence: "This movie is better than that movie."
Correct sentence: "The teacher is very good."

questions.hindi: अगर वह जल्दी आया, तो हम शुरू करेंगे।
options: I wish I had more money.
I wish I knew this language.
If he comes early, we will start.
questions.answer: If he comes early, we will start.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "अगर वह जल्दी आया, तो हम शुरू करेंगे।" = "If he comes early, we will start."
Full sentence: "I wish I knew this language."
